goal: controlflow-review delegates the mechanical/style pass to native Copilot code review and adds the ControlFlow layer (scope drift, evidence discipline, proactive vulnerability search) without duplicating native review.

input.diff: a diff requiring both mechanical and behavioral review

assertions: controlflow-review SKILL.md states it is a layer over native Copilot review, not a replacement.
The mechanical/style pass is delegated to native Copilot code review (or security-review).
ControlFlow adds scope-drift, evidence discipline, and proactive vulnerability/error search.
The skill must not duplicate native Copilot code review's mechanical pass.
ControlFlow keeps no agents of its own beyond the planner.
